overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Unity showing an assassin character walking along the Champs-Élysées in 18th-century Paris during golden hour. The character progresses from a tree-lined avenue with stone buildings into an open market plaza with wooden stalls, passing pedestrians in period clothing and horse-drawn carriages.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined historic boulevard with stone facades

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the avenue, navigating between pedestrians in 18th-century period clothing

entered.detail: multi-story stone buildings with classic French architectural details lining the left side of the avenue
double row of tall trees with autumn foliage creating a canopy over the boulevard
black wrought-iron street lamps with multiple lanterns spaced along the sidewalk
black metal posts connected by chains separating the walkway from the garden area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sun-dappled tree-lined avenue with historic stone buildings on the left. The assassin character walks forward through moderate crowds of pedestrians dressed in 18th-century clothing. Golden morning light filters through the autumn canopy, casting long shadows across the cobblestone street.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional avenue section approaching open plaza

events.description: large black enclosed horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the avenue

agents.ego_description: continuing down the avenue while passing a slow-moving carriage and navigating around scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black enclosed carriage with large wheels moving from right to left across the frame

entered.detail: large black enclosed carriage with wooden wheels and driver seated at the front
stone seating along the left side of the walkway beneath the trees

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a more open section of the boulevard where the buildings give way to tree-lined pathways. A large black horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right, and stone benches become visible along the left side. The ground transitions from cobblestones to larger paved tiles as the avenue widens approaching a distant plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market plaza with wooden stalls and tents

events.description: transition from tree-lined avenue into open market square with wooden market structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area, passing by wooden stalls and approaching a central gathering space

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress and white apron walking near the market stalls

entered.detail: rustic wooden market stalls with canvas awnings and various goods displayed
red wooden carriage with open sides parked near the market area
stone circular well or fountain structure in the plaza center

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide market plaza with wooden stalls and tents set up on the right side. The tree canopy ends, revealing a bright open sky. The character walks past a circular stone well in the center of the plaza toward market structures, with a red carriage parked nearby and more pedestrians browsing the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded, tree-lined avenue into a bright, open market plaza. It begins with the assassin walking through moderate crowds along a cobblestone street, where golden morning light filters through an autumn canopy and casts long shadows against historic stone buildings. As the character moves forward, the buildings recede to make way for wider paved pathways and stone benches, while a large black horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right. The scene then expands as the tree canopy ends, revealing a bright open sky and a wide plaza filled with wooden stalls and tents. Finally, the camera follows the character past a circular stone well and a parked red carriage toward the bustling market structures.
